Inverter Battery in Gajwel | Tubular Batteries for Power Cuts

Exide InvaTubular & Amaron Tall Tubular batteries — delivered and installed at your home across Siddipet, Medak & 50 km radius.

📞 Call 9397617823 💬 WhatsApp Order

Why Telangana Villages Need a Good Inverter Battery

Power cuts in Gajwel mandal, Siddipet district, and Medak district can range from 4 hours to 10+ hours daily — especially during summer months and agricultural pumping seasons. A quality inverter battery is not a luxury; it's essential for a functioning household or business.

Royal Batteries stocks the best inverter batteries in Telangana — tubular batteries specifically designed for deep discharge cycles that happen in rural areas with extended power cuts.

Our Inverter Battery Range

Exide InvaTubular 150 AH

Best Seller

India's #1 tubular battery. Perfect for homes with moderate load and 4–6 hour power cuts. C20 rating for village use.

💰 ₹9,500–₹11,000 ⏱ ~5 hrs (3 fans, 3 lights) 🛡 36 months

Exide InvaTubular 200 AH

Best for Villages

High-capacity tubular battery for extended village power cuts. Handles daily deep discharge with ease.

💰 ₹12,500–₹15,000 ⏱ ~8 hrs (4 fans, 4 lights, TV) 🛡 36 months

Amaron Current Tall Tubular 150 AH

Fast Charge

Superior charge acceptance — reaches 80% charge quickly, ideal when power comes for short windows.

💰 ₹10,500–₹12,500 ⏱ ~5 hrs (3 fans, 3 lights) 🛡 36 months

Exide Flat FXST 100 AH

Budget

Affordable flat plate battery for families with smaller loads and 1–3 hour power cuts.

💰 ₹4,500–₹5,500 ⏱ ~2 hrs (2 fans, 2 lights) 🛡 24 months

Free AH Calculation — Tell Us Your Load

Not sure which AH battery you need? Call or WhatsApp us at 9397617823 with your list of appliances. We'll calculate the exact battery size for your home within minutes — completely free.

As a general guide:

  • 2 fans + 2 lights: 100 AH (2–3 hours backup)
  • 3 fans + 3 lights: 150 AH (4–5 hours backup)
  • 4 fans + 4 lights + TV: 200 AH (6–8 hours backup)
  • Add 50 AH per additional air cooler
FAQ

Inverter Battery FAQs — Gajwel & Telangana Villages

Which inverter battery is best for villages in Gajwel area?
For villages with 6–10 hour power cuts, the Exide InvaTubular 150AH or 200AH is the best choice. These tubular batteries handle deep discharge well. Price from ₹9,500–₹14,500 at Royal Batteries Gajwel.
What AH inverter battery do I need?
For 3 fans + 3 lights for 4 hours: 120–150AH. For 4 fans + 4 lights + TV for 6 hours: 150–200AH. Visit our showroom or call 9397617823 — we'll calculate the exact requirement for your home load.
Do you install inverter batteries at home?
Yes! We deliver and install inverter batteries at homes, shops, and farms across a 50 km radius from Gajwel. Installation includes connecting to your existing inverter and checking that everything works correctly.
How long do inverter batteries last in Telangana?
Good-quality tubular batteries (Exide InvaTubular, Amaron Tall Tubular) last 4–6 years with proper water maintenance every 2–3 months. Flat-plate batteries last 2–3 years.
What is the price of an inverter battery in Gajwel?
Inverter battery prices at Royal Batteries: Flat plate (100AH) from ₹4,500; Tubular (150AH) from ₹9,000; Tubular (200AH) from ₹12,500. Price includes installation and old battery disposal.

Order Your Inverter Battery Today
